subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of God! Service to the friends brings you lordship in both worlds, and servitude at His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی خدمت یاران کنی و سروری دو جهان یابی و عبودیت آستان کنی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
